title: Drishyam 2
tmdbOverview: 7 years after the case related to Vijay Salgaonkar and his family was closed, a series of unexpected events bring truth to light that threatens to change everything for the Salgaonkars. Can Vijay save his family this time?
synopsis: Drishyam 2 (2022) is a thriller, drama and mystery film from India. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.2 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a UA certification (IN rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
